mapper.select: SELECT id, business_domain_id, ticket_type_id, scope, name, content_json, sort_order FROM ticket_template WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, business_domain_id, ticket_type_id, scope, name, content_json, status, sort_order FROM ticket_template WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_template ( business_domain_id, ticket_type_id, scope, name, content_json, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{businessDomainId}, #{ticketTypeId}, #{scope}, #{name}, #{contentJson}, #{sortOrder}, 'active', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_template SET ticket_type_id = #{ticketTypeId}, scope = #{scope}, name = #{name}, content_json = #{contentJson}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ticket_template WHERE id = #{id} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId}
